mapper.select: SELECT P.PROGRAM_ID AS programId , P.PROGRAM_NM AS programNm , P.PROGRAM_TYPE AS programType , P.VENUE_ID AS venueId , P.DESCRIPTION AS description , P.AGE_LIMIT AS ageLimit , P.RUNNING_TIME AS runningTime , P.POSTER_IMG AS posterImg , CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), P.START_DATE, 23) AS startDate , CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), P.END_DATE, 23) AS endDate , P.OPEN_TIME AS openTime , P.CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime , P.SESSION_COUNT AS sessionCount , P.FIRST_SESSION_TIME AS firstSessionTime , P.SESSION_INTERVAL AS sessionInterval , P.DEFAULT_ONLINE_CAP AS defaultOnlineCap , P.DEFAULT_OFFLINE_CAP AS defaultOfflineCap , P.USE_YN AS useYn , P.REG_USER AS regUser , CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), P.REG_DT, 120) AS regDt , V.VENUE_NM AS venueNm FROM PROGRAM P LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE P.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId}

SELECT P.PROGRAM_ID , P.PROGRAM_NM , P.PROGRAM_TYPE , P.VENUE_ID , P.USE_YN , CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), P.START_DATE, 23) AS START_DATE , CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), P.END_DATE, 23) AS END_DATE , V.VENUE_NM FROM PROGRAM P LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND P.PROGRAM_TYPE = #{searchCondition2}
AND P.VENUE_ID = #{searchCondition3}
AND P.PROGRAM_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND P.PROGRAM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND V.VENUE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY P.PROGRAM_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY
SELECT PROGRAM_ID , PROGRAM_NM , VENUE_ID FROM PROGRAM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PROGRAM_NM ASC
SELECT PROGRAM_ID , PROGRAM_NM , VENUE_ID FROM PROGRAM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND PROGRAM_TYPE = #{programType} ORDER BY PROGRAM_NM ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE (PROGRAM_ID, TYPE_ID, BASE_PRICE, SAT_PRICE, SUN_PRICE, HOL_PRICE, SORT_ORDER) VALUES (#{programId}, #{typeId}, #{basePrice}, #{satPrice}, #{sunPrice}, #{holPrice}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT TYPE_ID FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE WHERE PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

SELECT PTT.PROGRAM_ID AS programId , PTT.TYPE_ID AS typeId , TT.TYPE_NM AS typeNm , PTT.BASE_PRICE AS basePrice , PTT.SAT_PRICE AS satPrice , PTT.SUN_PRICE AS sunPrice , PTT.HOL_PRICE AS holPrice , PTT.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON PTT.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID WHERE PTT.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} ORDER BY PTT.SORT_ORDER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PROGRAM_DISCOUNT (PD_ID, PROGRAM_ID, DISCOUNT_NM, DISCOUNT_TYPE, DISCOUNT_VALUE, VERIFY_REQUIRED, VERIFY_ITEM, ROUNDING_UNIT, ROUNDING_TYPE, USE_YN, SORT_ORDER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{pdId}, #{programId}, #{discountNm}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{verifyRequired}, #{verifyItem}, #{roundingUnit}, #{roundingType}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT PD_ID AS pdId , PROGRAM_ID AS programId , DISCOUNT_NM AS discountNm , DISCOUNT_TYPE AS discountType , DISCOUNT_VALUE AS discountValue , VERIFY_REQUIRED AS verifyRequired , VERIFY_ITEM AS verifyItem , ROUNDING_UNIT AS roundingUnit , ROUNDING_TYPE AS roundingType , USE_YN AS useYn , SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), REG_DT, 120) AS regDt FROM PROGRAM_DISCOUNT WHERE PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SESSION_TEMPLATE (PROGRAM_ID, SESSION_NO, DAY_TYPE, EVENT_TIME, ENABLED, ONLINE_CAP, OFFLINE_CAP) VALUES (#{programId}, #{sessionNo}, #{dayType}, #{eventTime}, #{enabled}, #{onlineCap}, #{offlineCap})
INSERT INTO PRICE_TEMPLATE (PROGRAM_ID, SESSION_NO, TYPE_ID, DAY_TYPE, PRICE) VALUES (#{programId}, #{sessionNo}, #{typeId}, #{dayType}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_NO AS sessionNo, DAY_TYPE AS dayType, EVENT_TIME AS eventTime, ENABLED AS enabled, ISNULL(ONLINE_CAP, 0) AS onlineCap, ISNULL(OFFLINE_CAP, 0) AS offlineCap FROM SESSION_TEMPLATE WHERE PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} ORDER BY DAY_TYPE, SESSION_NO
SELECT SESSION_NO AS sessionNo, TYPE_ID AS typeId, DAY_TYPE AS dayType, PRICE AS price FROM PRICE_TEMPLATE WHERE PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} ORDER BY DAY_TYPE, SESSION_NO, TYPE_ID
